vocab.meaning: vị trí trang trọng nhất/vị trí ưu tiên
vocab.example: The luxury watch my parents gave me for my 21st birthday now holds pride of place in my accessory collection.

vocab.word: at the top of one's lungs
vocab.meaning: hết sức/cực kỳ (diễn tả sự vui mừng phấn khích)
vocab.example: I almost screamed at the top of my lungs when I realized the gift box contained the limited edition watch I'd been eyeing.

vocab.meaning: ăn mặc chỉnh tề, sang trọng
vocab.example: I only wear that specific gifted watch when I'm dressed to the nines for high-profile weddings or formal galas.

vocab.meaning: vật báu/thứ được ai đó cực kỳ yêu chiều, giữ gìn
vocab.example: That vintage timepiece was the apple of my grandfather's eye before he passed it down to me as a graduation gift.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ hạnh phúc/vui sướng tột độ
vocab.example: I was on cloud nine for an entire week after my mentor surprised me with a professional diving watch.

vocab.meaning: vô cùng may mắn (như trúng số)
vocab.example: I felt like I had hit the jackpot when my brother gave me his old Rolex as a housewarming present.

vocab.word: look a gift horse in the mouth
vocab.ipa: /lʊk ə ɡɪft hɔːs ɪn ðə maʊθ/
vocab.meaning: xét nét, chê bai món quà được tặng
vocab.example: Even though it was a bit bulky for my wrist, I didn't want to look a gift horse in the mouth since it was a heartfelt present.

vocab.word: bring a smile to one's face
vocab.meaning: làm ai đó mỉm cười/vui vẻ
vocab.example: Glancing at the inscription on the back of the watch always brings a smile to my face during a stressful day.

vocab.word: a chip off the old block
vocab.meaning: giống hệt cha/mẹ (thường dùng khi nói về sở thích đồng hồ di truyền)
vocab.example: My dad gave me a classic pilot watch because I'm a chip off the old block and share his fascination with aviation.

vocab.meaning: hàng thật/hàng xịn (không phải đồ giả)
vocab.example: At first I thought it was a replica, but it turned out to be the real McCoy, which made the gift even more staggering.
